original_title: MUDR-144 Still, I don't fall ... A beautiful girl who keeps resisting, a humiliation ring ●. ~ Days of being confined and trembling with bondage training ~ Mitsuki Nagisa
overview: [Mitsuki Nagisa lifts the ban on bondage hanging! ] "... I will never fall to my heart--." Eiji's only daughter, Mitsuki, who died in a conflict between yakuza, uses her father's brother Yuji to deceive money from men and make a living. It was. Yuji was complaining about her wrongdoing, but her casual words suddenly changed her feelings. The cheeky girl is tied up and confined, and is the target of men's revenge. Unreasonable training, a circle of humiliation ●… Still, the girl continues to resist.
